compiled_state.title: RED: Contract test for proposal generation section structure in SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Write tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-proposals.sh — a bash contract test verifying implementation-plan SKILL.md contains required proposal generation sections.

**Test functions** (each greps SKILL.md only, NOT proposal-schema.md):
1. test_proposal_generation_section_exists — grep for "### Proposal Generation" heading
2. test_minimum_proposals_requirement — awk-scoped to Proposal Generation section, grep for "at least 3" or "minimum.*3"
3. test_proposal_format_fields — awk-scoped, grep for all 6 fields: title, description, files, pros, cons, risk
4. test_distinctness_validation_gate — awk-scoped, grep for distinctness with structural axes (data layer, control flow, dependency, interface boundary)

**TDD**: RED — all 4 tests FAIL against current SKILL.md. Register RED markers in .test-index so test gate tolerates failures.

**Test approach**: Execute bash test functions using grep/awk to search SKILL.md for required section headings and content patterns. All assertions scope to the Proposal Generation section using awk to prevent false positives from elsewhere in the file.

## Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-proposals.sh (create)
- .test-index (modify — add mapping and RED markers)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) with RED markers active
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-proposals.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 4 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-proposals.sh | { read n; [ "$n" -ge 4 ]; }
- [ ] .test-index contains RED markers for test functions
  Verify: grep -q "\[test_proposal_generation_section_exists\]" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] .test-index maps SKILL.md to new test file specifically
  Verify: grep "implementation-plan/SKILL.md" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q "test-implementation-plan-proposals.sh"
